scenario.name: Basic UAS responder
scenario.send: SIP/2.0 488 Not Acceptable Here [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Reason: SIP ;cause=600 ;text="Busy Everywhere" Content-Length: 0

BYE sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Via: SIP/2.0/TLS 127.0.0.2:15061;rport=25983;ibmsid=local.1536222863252_65680596_65678346;branch=z9hG4bK275291644388129 Via: SIP/2.0/TLS 172.16.10.6;branch=z9hG4bKbcefbe26d75c41e8a9a2050568d886e-AP;ft=11192297;received=172.16.10.6;rport=34578 Via: SIP/2.0/TLS 172.16.10.2;branch=z9hG4bKbcefbe26d75c41e8a9a2050568d886e From: sip:[field1]@[local_ip];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];tag=[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] Contact: sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport] CSeq: 1 BYE Route: <sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=[transport];ipcs-line=3234;lr> Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0
